question: Can a new adaptation objective or additional non-final data repair appended-token prediction?
trigger: Positive model-dependent claim is still desired
required_design: Train/dev only; no ACT; at least 3 seeds; compare adapted branch to original continued-pretraining control
pass_gate: added/base/all gates pass 3/3 and normalized adapted/original ratios<=1.100000
notes: Must go beyond smaller vocab and longer 8k MLM

question: Does the redesigned branch pass matched-token raw and normalized MLM controls?
required_design: Same train-token budget across adapted and original-control runs; Step16-style word/char audit
notes: No downstream or translation final readout before this passes

question: Do frozen encoder proxies improve after a control-passing repair?
required_design: Freeze model/task/scoring decisions on Mark/dev; bootstrap confidence intervals
pass_gate: Statistically supported gains on nontrivial tasks
notes: Book/genre and language ID cannot be primary evidence

question: Does the adapted main model reach 80 percent of high-resource reference?
trigger: E02 passes and translation pair/scoring are frozen on Mark/dev
required_design: Method-matched adapted-XLM-R comparison; ACT read exactly once

question: Does the diagnostic finding hold outside Bible text?
trigger: Claim wording expands beyond Bible-domain evidence
required_design: Use external corpus with provenance and fresh final split
pass_gate: Consistent tokenizer and MLM diagnostic trends
notes: Needed only for broad generalization wording

question: Which initialization is best under a successful repair objective?
required_design: Test fvt against at least mean and align under the successful objective
pass_gate: same control gates and nonworse category losses
